options.description: Destination of the bag file to create

options.description: Maximum bag file size in bytes (0 for unlimited)

options.description: Maximum bag file duration in seconds (0 for unlimited)

options.description: Disable topic auto discovery while recording

options.description: Topic polling interval in milliseconds for detection of new topics

options.description: Path to a YAML file defining QoS profile overrides

options.description: Storage identifier to be used

options.description: Path to a YAML file defining storage specific configurations

options.description: Compression mode used for storage

options.description: Compression format/algorithm used for storage

options.name: --node-name
options.description: Name of the recording node

options.name: --qos-profile-overrides-path

options.name: --read-ahead-queue-size
options.description: Size of the message read-ahead queue

options.description: Publish to /clock at a specific frequency in Hz

options.description: Start playback paused

options.name: --storage-config-file
options.description: Path to a YAML file defining storage specific configurations
